memory:memory/2026-04-11.md:1:8.snippet: - Continued work on `devonn-ai` and added a custom `DESIGN.md` (Fortress Design System), project-local `AGENTS.md`, and `dashboard-demo.html` to ground future UI work in a consistent dark/cyan/violet design language. - Fixed a bad commit that accidentally included `node_modules`; ensured `devonn-ai/.gitignore` contains `node_modules/` and `dist/`. - Integrated Bytez into Devonn.ai as a real LLM provider path via `src/providers/llm.ts`, replacing the intelligence agent's canned mock responses with provider-backed calls. - Added provider-aware config in `devonn-ai/src/utils/config.ts` with support for `LLM_PROVIDER=bytez|openclaw`, `BYTEZ_KEY`, `BYTEZ_API_URL`, `BYTEZ_MODEL`, optional `BYTEZ_P
